privacy.title: Privacy Policy

meta.title: Privacy Policy | B2B Insight Panel
meta.description: How B2B Insight Panel collects, uses, and protects your personal data.

privacy.intro: B2B Insight Panel ("we," "us," or "our"), powered by Beacon Martech, operates a global community of business professionals and decision-makers participating in research activities, including surveys, interviews, focus groups, and other market research initiatives. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and protect your information.

sections.heading: 2. Information we collect
paragraphs: Personal information: name, email address, country and region, professional details (job title, industry, company size, seniority), areas of expertise, and payment information required for honorariums.
Research information: survey responses, participation history, profile information, and study qualification responses.
Technical information: IP address, device identifiers, browser information, operating system, usage analytics, and cookie information.

sections.heading: 3. How we use your information
list: Match participants with relevant research opportunities
Improve our platform and respondent experience
Communicate study invitations and account updates
Share relevant industry content, research opportunities, and solutions related to challenges and interests identified in your profile, subject to your consent

sections.heading: 4. How we share information
paragraphs: We do not sell or rent personal information. Your name, email address, or identifiable information will not be shared with research sponsors without your explicit consent.
list: Research clients, in aggregated and anonymized form
Legal authorities where required by law

sections.heading: 5. International data transfers
paragraphs: As a global platform, your information may be processed in countries outside your residence. We implement appropriate safeguards to protect your information.

sections.heading: 6. Data retention
paragraphs: We retain information while your account remains active and as necessary for:

sections.heading: 7. Your rights
paragraphs: Depending on applicable laws, you may have the right to:

sections.heading: 8. Security
paragraphs: We implement reasonable technical and organizational measures to protect your information, including encryption, access controls, and security monitoring.

sections.heading: 9. Children's privacy
paragraphs: Our services are intended only for individuals aged 18 years or older.

sections.heading: 10. Contact us
paragraphs: Questions about this policy? Reach us at support@b2binsightpanel.com or via our

cookie.title: Cookie Policy

meta.title: Cookie Policy | B2B Insight Panel
meta.description: How B2B Insight Panel uses cookies and similar technologies.

cookie.intro: Cookies are small text files stored on your device that help improve website functionality and user experience. This Cookie Policy explains how B2B Insight Panel uses cookies and similar technologies when you visit our website or use our app.

sections.heading: 1. What are cookies
paragraphs: Cookies are small text files stored on your device that help improve website functionality and user experience.

rows: Necessary for account login and platform functionality
Help us understand platform usage and improve services
Used, where consent is provided, to deliver relevant communications and content

sections.heading: 3. Managing cookies
paragraphs: You may disable cookies through your browser settings. Certain features may not function properly without cookies.

sections.heading: 4. Contact us
paragraphs: Questions? Reach us at support@b2binsightpanel.com or via our

eula.title: End User License Agreement

meta.title: EULA — End User License Agreement | B2B Insight Panel
meta.description: The license terms governing your use of the B2B Insight Panel app and website.

eula.intro: This End User License Agreement ("EULA") governs your use of the B2B Insight Panel mobile application and website (the "App"). By installing or using the App, you agree to be bound by this EULA.

sections.heading: 1. License grant
paragraphs: B2B Insight Panel grants you a limited, non-exclusive, non-transferable license to access and use our website and mobile applications.

sections.heading: 2. Restrictions
list: Copy, modify, or distribute platform components

sections.heading: 3. User content
paragraphs: Survey responses and profile information remain subject to our Privacy Policy.

sections.heading: 4. Updates
paragraphs: We may provide software updates and modifications at our discretion.

sections.heading: 5. Account suspension
paragraphs: We may suspend access for:

sections.heading: 6. Intellectual property
paragraphs: All software, trademarks, logos, and content are owned by B2B Insight Panel and/or Beacon Martech.

sections.heading: 7. Disclaimer

sections.heading: 8. Limitation of liability

terms.title: Terms & Conditions

meta.title: Terms & Conditions | B2B Insight Panel
meta.description: The terms governing your access to and use of B2B Insight Panel.

terms.intro: By accessing or using B2B Insight Panel, you agree to these Terms.

sections.heading: 1. Eligibility
paragraphs: You must:
list: Maintain only one account unless otherwise approved

sections.heading: 2. Participant consent
paragraphs: By creating an account and completing your profile, you consent to:
list: Receiving communications related to studies, industry insights, and solutions that may be relevant to professional challenges and interests identified in your profile
Processing of your information as described in our Privacy Policy

sections.heading: 3. Research participation
paragraphs: Participation opportunities are not guaranteed. Eligibility may vary based on study requirements. Providing false information may result in account suspension. You may withdraw consent at any time by updating communication preferences or contacting support.

sections.heading: 4. Rewards and honorariums
paragraphs: Honorariums vary by study. Rewards may be withheld in cases of:

sections.heading: 5. Fraud prevention
paragraphs: Users must not:
list: Use VPNs, proxies, bots, or automation tools

sections.heading: 6. Communications
paragraphs: You agree that we may send:
list: Relevant industry content and professional solutions related to topics and challenges identified in your profile, where consent has been provided

sections.heading: 7. Intellectual property
paragraphs: All platform content, software, logos, and materials remain the property of B2B Insight Panel and Beacon Martech.

sections.heading: 8. Limitation of liability
paragraphs: We make reasonable efforts to maintain service availability but do not guarantee uninterrupted access.

sections.heading: 9. Termination
paragraphs: We reserve the right to suspend or terminate accounts for violations of these Terms.

sections.heading: 10. Contact us
paragraphs: Questions about these Terms? Reach us via our
